pi_items.source: setup_task.sh comments and dynamic Python data generation

privileged_info_summary: The task relies entirely on a synthetic dataset generated at runtime in setup_task.sh. The script creates 15 valid participants (P01-P15) with realistic logistic psychometric responses to two conditions ('fins_in', 'fins_out') at a standard length of 100. It also deliberately injects a contaminated participant ('P99') who uniformly responds '1' ('comparison longer') across all trials. The expected output report must be saved to /home/ga/pebl/analysis/mullerlyer_report.json.
